title: TDD Methodology Enforcement
description: Update Ralph skills (prd, ralph) and loop CLAUDE.md to enforce 100% TDD compliance. Every story must require tests to be written BEFORE implementation. Add verification commands that run tests. The quality requirements section should mandate 'red-green-refactor' cycle. Acceptance: All skills mention TDD, loop CLAUDE.md requires test-first, verification runs tests automatically.
closeReason: TDD methodology enforcement complete. All three skill files updated to enforce 100% TDD compliance with red-green-refactor cycle. Builder branch overstory/tdd-builder/ralph-06d3 ready for merge.

title: Enhanced Dashboard Metrics
description: Improve dashboard with precise TDD and agile metrics. Add: test coverage per loop, test-first compliance rate, failure reason categorization, velocity (stories/iteration), cumulative flow diagram data, time per story, rollback count. The LoopMetrics interface needs extension. Acceptance: Dashboard shows TDD metrics, better visualizations, actionable insights.
closeReason: Enhanced Dashboard Metrics implemented. Extended LoopMetrics interface with TDD/agile metrics (testCoverage, testFirstCompliance, failureReasons, velocity, cumulativeFlowData, timePerStory, rollbackCount). Added metric parsing in process-manager.ts, visualizations in dashboard.ts, and defaults in state.ts. Builder metrics-builder completed and merge_ready sent.

title: Context & Memory Transport
description: Fix context transport between loop iterations. Currently: 1) Root CLAUDE.md is skipped (wrong), 2) No initial patterns in progress.txt, 3) Memory not carried between tasks in same loop. Improve: copy root CLAUDE.md context, initialize Codebase Patterns from project scan, add iteration-to-iteration context handoff. Acceptance: Full project context available, patterns persist, smooth context handoff.
closeReason: Fixed context transport between Ralph loop iterations: 1) Root CLAUDE.md now included in project-context.md, 2) progress.txt pre-populated with detected Codebase Patterns, 3) Added Context Handoff Mechanism section to CLAUDE.md. Builder: context-transport-builder. Commit: 5e38346.
